mechanism: Each landing zone identity gets Directory.Read.All to query users, groups, and principals in Entra ID.
why: Orphaned RBAC assignments appear as unknown objects — resolving them to a displayName for removal requires querying Entra ID, which fails without Graph permissions.

related.note: Managed identity receives Graph permissions — must be provisioned first.
Platform app registration performs the appRoleAssignedTo assignment during provisioning.
cleanup-roles job queries Entra ID to detect deleted principals.

violations: Landing zone identity with Directory.ReadWrite.All — over-privileged.
Landing zone identity without Directory.Read.All — Entra ID queries fail.
